title: Dungeon's Delight: Gourmet Battles
description: An addon for the Farmer's Delight mod inspired by the anime Dungeon Meshi
body:
![Laios in an dungeon by a campfire and a slime](https://i.imgur.com/jCwivby.png)


📖About:
Dungeon's Delight is an addon for the farmers delight mod inspired by the Dungeon Meshi anime, within this mod you will find a variety of foods made from the monsters you find in the vanilla game, the mod has a total of 38 new foods, 2 new weapons and 19 new achievements, as well as a recipe book.

📒Starting:
To start the mod is very simple, just craft the recipe book using a common book, rotten meat, gunpowder, string and slime, and after clicking you will receive all the recipes on how to survive without food in a dungeon, and most of the recipes and self explanatory, however, some monster parts need to be cooked or mixed with other monster parts to be eaten by the player

✅Compatibility:
At the moment the mod is compatible with the base farmers delight mod and should be compatible with any other mod, however there is a possibility that it may not be compatible with mods that change the loot of the mod's vanilla monsters

I'm also working on compatibility with other mods that add dungeon-style monsters that could be a good addition, as well as of course increasing the amount of recipes possible with vanilla monsters.

- ⚙️Compatibility and Next updates
- ☑️1.0.1-Finish food with vanilla mobs
- ❎1.0.4-Add dishes made with the ICE AND FIRE mod
- ❎1.0.5-Add plants and certain mobs from the original anime
- ❎1.0.6-Add dishes made with REALM RPG mods
- ❎1.0.8-Add dishes made with MONSTER PLUS mod


Farmer's Delight is a Mandatory Requirement.

This is the rawest version of the mod so bugs are to be expected and more content will be added in the future

 Found any bug or just wanna send me a suggestion, Maybe interact with the community?                           Discord: https://discord.gg/Be4ggJrWZy

You can use this mod in a video or modpack.

Laios skin by Shikuuz
